headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Vulcan Materials, Lowers Price Target to $321
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Angel Castillo   maintains Vulcan Materials (NYSE:VMC) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $322 to $321.
